title: [App] Flamingo/Spoonbill - Connect headset as standalone
scenario: Verify that a Flamingo/Spoonbill headset not paired with a Charge Case can be connected and function as a standalone headset.
steps: 1) Pair the device with the app -> Device should show as standalone headset with only battery indicator.
2) Go to Settings > Software update -> Only headset information should be displayed.
expected: When a Flamingo/Spoonbill headset is not paired with a Charge Case, it can be connected as a standalone headset.
